rows.label: tev022401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Latte about the infrastructure of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Latte about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Latte about her work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Latte about her work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0001
rows.name:
This commercial district was designed
to have an old-timey flavor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0002
rows.name:
But Armory Alley in the administrative district,
where BLADEs buy their weapons and such, was built
to be totally state-of-the-art. It's pretty amazing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Just press a few buttons at a terminal
and you can buy anything. Even Dolls![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Of course, everything that I touch
immediately breaks, so I won't be
buying anything like that anytime soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Bwah! Why are sparks coming out
of my ordering terminal? And after
I just said that... Aaaargh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0008
rows.name: Welcome to the Sunshine Café![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Oh, hey there, [ST:playername ]. You probably
want a latte or something, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Yeaaaaah. See, actually, the
espresso machine... Well, I
kind of broke it. Again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0011
rows.name:
But I could make you a drip coffee in
this old-school plastic coffee maker![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Letrick at the cathedral suggested that,
since it probably wouldn't break even if I
dropped it. He's been such a big help to me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0020
rows.name:
After I broke my third ordering
terminal, Bergamot told me to
just use a pen and paper.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0021
rows.name:
I haven't actually had to write in
longhand since I was in school. I've
completely forgotten how to spell![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0022
rows.name:
What about you, [ST:playername ]? I bet you know
how scary it is to realize you've
become reliant on a digital world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Anyway, that's one hot coffee.
C-O-F-E-E...Y? No, that's
weird. Let me try again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0024
rows.name:
...Huh? Oh, come ON! There's no ink
coming out! And this is a brand-new pen![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0039
rows.name:
I broke all those ordering terminals,
and the pen and paper thing didn't
work out so well either...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0040
rows.name:
So I've decided to just memorize
everyone's orders! Aaaand what
can I get you today?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0041
rows.name:
...Okay, so you want today's lunch special and pancake
combo. You want pepperoncini in your pasta, and
afterward, a double espresso with three sugars.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0042
rows.name:
...You also want a grappa caffè corretto as an aperitif,
and on your way out, an iced cappuccino in a to-go
cup with pistachio ice cream and two...straws?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022401_MSG0043
rows.name: ...Oh no! My brain! I broke it![ST:wait ]
